title: forge-essentials-client
description:
This is the (optional) client addon for ForgeEssentials
It provides some additional features, which are not possible with server-only forge mods.
body:
**This is the (optional) client addon for ForgeEssentials**

It provides some additional features, which are not possible with server-only forge mods:  (Note: The client addon is functional compatible with the server side mod and is thus only updated when there is a change on the client side)

- /reach command to modify reach distance for players
- /noclip
- WorldEdit overlay
- Permission overlay
